properties.code: function createRenderer(){function rr(ctx,x,y,w,h,r){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x+r,y);ctx.lineTo(x+w-r,y);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y,x+w,y+r);ctx.lineTo(x+w,y+h-r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x+w,y+h,x+w-r,y+h);ctx.lineTo(x+r,y+h);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y+h,x,y+h-r);ctx.lineTo(x,y+r);ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x,y,x+r,y);ctx.closePath()}return{render(t,context){const ctx=context.mainContext,w=context.width,h=context.height;let g=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,w,h);g.addColorStop(0,'#090d17');g.addColorStop(.45,'#102638');g.addColorStop(1,'#2b1830');ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);ctx.save();ctx.globalCompositeOperation='screen';for(let i=0;i<4;i++){const rg=ctx.createRadialGradient(240+i*465+Math.sin(t+i)*78,240+(i%2)*510,0,240+i*465,240+(i%2)*510,460);rg.addColorStop(0,['rgba(125,211,252,.3)','rgba(250,204,21,.24)','rgba(123,216,143,.2)','rgba(251,113,133,.22)'][i]);rg.addColorStop(1,'rgba(0,0,0,0)');ctx.fillStyle=rg;ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h)}ctx.restore();ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='900 48px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('Access Media Editing Desk',92,98);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.66)';ctx.font='700 24px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('photo, inserted video, waveform UI, and AAC audio all come from ./access',96,136);ctx.save();ctx.globalAlpha=.1;ctx.strokeStyle='#fff';for(let x=100;x<w-100;x+=58){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(x,180);ctx.lineTo(x+Math.sin(t+x)*38,h-170);ctx.stroke()}ctx.restore();ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.06)';rr(ctx,78,176,w-156,h-260,42);ctx.fill();ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.16)';ctx.stroke();const p=Math.min(1,t/7);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.14)';rr(ctx,110,h-70,w-220,12,6);ctx.fill();g=ctx.createLinearGradient(110,0,w-110,0);g.addColorStop(0,'#7dd3fc');g.addColorStop(.5,'#facc15');g.addColorStop(1,'#fb7185');ctx.fillStyle=g;rr(ctx,110,h-70,(w-220)*p,12,6);ctx.fill()}}}

function createRenderer(){function cl(v){return Math.max(0,Math.min(1,v))}function out(v){v=cl(v);return 1-Math.pow(1-v,3)}return{render(t,context){const ctx=context.mainContext,w=context.width,h=context.height;ctx.save();let a=out((t-.8)/.8);ctx.globalAlpha=a;ctx.fillStyle='#fff';ctx.font='900 28px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('access/photo.png',156,900);ctx.fillText('access/clip.mp4',974,742);ctx.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,.64)';ctx.font='700 21px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('preloaded image-layer',156,934);ctx.fillText('video-layer composited per frame',974,776);ctx.restore();ctx.save();a=out((t-4.7)/.8);ctx.globalAlpha=a;ctx.fillStyle='#facc15';ctx.textAlign='right';ctx.font='900 28px system-ui, sans-serif';ctx.fillText('AAC audio muxed into exported MP4',w-112,h-118);ctx.restore()}}}
